  "claims": [
    "The transportation industry plays a critical role in fighting against human traffickers.",
    "More than 1.7 million trucking industry professionals have received critical training through the partnership with Truckers Against Trafficking.",
    "Senate Bill 14 classifies the crime of child sex trafficking as a serious felony under California’s Three Strikes law.",
    "SB 14, which took effect January 1, 2024, ensures longer prison sentences for those who profit from the sale of children.",
    "California has earned the distinction of being one of the largest sites of human trafficking in the United States."
  ]
